channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download MusicPod 2.15.1
item.description: MusicPod is a free music, radio, TV and podcast player that allows you to stream your favorite songs, listen to your favorite radio stations and enjoy all your favorite podcasts. in the same place. User-friendly interface and intuitive controls make it easy to navigate through your music library and quickly access your favorite tracks. MusicPod Features Play local audio files (mp3, flac, mp4, ogg) Find your local audio library organized by metadata Search local audio files sorted...

item.title: Download Rocrail Build 6801
item.description: Rocrail is a free software to control the training model for the operating system Linux , Apple macOS , Windows and Raspbian / Armbian . Rocrail bear all responsibility in the control of a railway model, and accessories of them. Trains can be controlled manually or fully controlled by software in automatic mode. A mixed operation, i.e. control a number of ships and other vessels at high speed fully automatic is possible. Rocrail - control layout for the operating system With Rocrail,...

item.title: Download SystemRescueCd 13.00
item.description: SystemRescueCd is a Linux system on CD-ROM can boot to repair your system or recover your information after a crash. SystemRescueCd aims to provide a simple way to perform the action administrator on your PC, such as creating and editing the partitions of the hard drive. It includes many system tools (partimage, parted, fstools) and basic options (commander midnight, editors, network tools). It is very simple to use: just boot the CDROM. Staff handle most of the system files needed (ext2 /...

item.title: Download Inno Setup Unpacker 2.2.6
item.description: Inno Setup is a popular and reliable application that creates program installers by helping you create scripts. Extracting the installation files from their container, resulting from compiling code with Inno Setup, can only be done through self-extracting files. In other words, you need to create a self-extracting executable to shell the installation documents. Inno Setup Unpacker can help you avoid such actions, which is especially useful because some system security protocols block...

Simply import images into Topaz Photo AI and it will use specially trained AI models to first detect unique details, clarity, and resolution issues before applying the intelligently adjusts to maximize your image quality. With a user-friendly interface, it offers advanced editing capabilities, including non-destructive editing, AI-powered adjustments, and precise control over color and tone. It also supports raw files from over 800 cameras and works with JPEG, TIF, PSD, PSB, PNG and DNG files. Additionally, it also includes photo organization tools to manage...

item.title: Download Argente System Repair 1.0.6.1
item.description: Argente System Repair is a lightweight utility designed to diagnose and fix common Windows system problems. It scans your system to identify errors in operating system components, file systems, installation files, and other system components, and then applies targeted fixes to resolve these problems. The tool provides different scan modes, including simple scan, recommended scan, and custom scan, allowing users to customize the repair process according to their needs. System Repair...

item.title: Download Perfectly Clear WorkBench 5.0.4.3157

One of the key features in Workbench is the ability to "export to API" when saving a Preset. This allows you to make image edits in Workbench and adjust the settings to suit your editing style and needs. You can...

item.title: Download Mixxx 2.5.6
item.description: Mixxx is free and open source DJ software designed for both professional and amateur DJs. It runs on multiple platforms, including Windows, macOS, and Linux. Mixxx allows DJs to mix and control audio tracks in real time, offering a wide range of features like beatmatching, crossfading, looping, EQ, effects, and more. With Mixxx, DJs can import audio files in a variety of formats, including MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, and AAC, and organize them into playlists. The software also supports...

item.title: Download Firewall Easy 0.9
item.description: Firewall Easy is an open source application that allows you to block internet access to other applications using Windows Firewall. Firewall Easy can be used to right click on a target program to block its internet access. You can also import/export rules from the Firewall Easy interface and manually add internet blockers. A simple but valuable tool to deny internet access to target apps etc. Features of Firewall Easy Easy to block apps by right clicking on the icon. Firewall Easy...

It automatically analyts, synchronize and backup your email, family photos, contacts, MP3, financial documentation and other important files-between desktop computers, laptops, servers, external drives and Windows Mobile devices as well as remotely via FTP , SFTP, WebDAV and more. The GoodSync synchronized software combines bulletproof reliability with an extremely easy interface to compare, synchronize...

item.title: Download IsMyLcdOK 6.17
item.description: IsMyLcdOK is a small program but is effective solution to easily check the pixel dead / paralyzed / stuck on the LCD screen. Many manufacturers offer a policy point of death industrial standard highest. IsMyLcdOK does not have to installed and can be executed easily from the desktop, and can be carried on a small USB or memory device to another. Check the dead pixel is very simple.
